reasoning: Koren, we're focusing on your lactate clearance and improving your aerobic base, essential for handling the sustained output needed for the Alpine Loop. Your last ride showed a comfortable base, but we need more intensity to bridge that 5-min to 20-min power drop. Let's push the boundaries today.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 sets of 5 mins at 242-256W followed by 4 mins at 201-218W, these over-unders improve lactate clearance and fatigue resistance.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
